channel.title: Vela — AI Intelligence Magazine
channel.description: 매주 월요일 자동 발행되는 AI 매거진. 파편을 매거진으로, 신호를 항해로.

item.title: [Cover] Let's build GPT · 처음부터 만드는 GPT
item.description: 이번 주 Vela가 추천하는 깊이 있는 강의. Andrej Karpathy의 시그니처.

item.title: [Agent] From Research Question to Scientific Workflow: Leveraging Agentic AI for Science Automation
item.description: Scientific workflow systems automate execution -- scheduling, fault tolerance, resource management -- but not the semantic translation that precedes it. Scientists still manually convert research questions into workflow specifications, a task requiring both domain knowledge and i

item.title: [Agent] Nemobot Games: Crafting Strategic AI Gaming Agents for Interactive Learning with Large Language Models
item.description: This paper introduces a new paradigm for AI game programming, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to extend and operationalize Claude Shannon's taxonomy of game-playing machines. Central to this paradigm is Nemobot, an interactive agentic engineering environment that enables

item.title: [LLM] MathDuels: Evaluating LLMs as Problem Posers and Solvers
item.description: As frontier language models attain near-ceiling performance on static mathematical benchmarks, existing evaluations are increasingly unable to differentiate model capabilities, largely because they cast models solely as solvers of fixed problem sets. We introduce MathDuels, a sel

item.title: [Safety] Evaluating alignment of behavioral dispositions in LLMs
[Agent] Improving the academic workflow: Introducing two AI agents for better figures and peer review
[LLM] ConvApparel: Measuring and bridging the realism gap in user simulators
[LLM] Towards developing future-ready skills with generative AI
[LLM] Designing synthetic datasets for the real world: Mechanism design and reasoning from first principles
